commands.repair_reason: Maintainer-authored, protected-label PR with a concrete medium security finding needs maintainer revision or explicit approval before merge.; Needs attention: The patch still writes resolved config data to a temporary handoff file, which can persist env-sourced secrets on disk after a crash.; Review finding: [P2] Avoid writing resolved full config to the handoff file — src/cli/update-cli/update-command.ts:2233 (sha=4c48c74aacdb251b8a9feb26d3eb7a529d1f18c4)
commands.review_summary:
This PR preserves pre-update channel config through update finalization and post-core plugin repair, changes pre-update snapshot overwrite behavior, and adds update CLI plus Docker upgrade survivor coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main's fresh post-core path hands off only plugin result/install records, and the resume path reads the post-doctor config before plugin repair. The linked regression issue supplies concrete package-upgrade steps, but I did not run a live package upgrade in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer-authored, protected-label PR with a concrete medium security finding needs maintainer revision or explicit approval before merge.
